titleStmt.title: SII 5.639: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 639. (A.R. No. 79 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiru manni vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum poṟce
yap pāvaiyum cirttanic celviyum tan perun=te viyarāki
Inpuṟa neṭutuya ruḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvanaveliyuṭ
paṭar vanavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇ
ṇaṟkaraṇmuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiya
rta muṭiyu māṅkavan ṟeviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum mun navar pa
kkal tennavan vaiytta cun=ta ramuṭiyu min=ti ra nāramum tenṟi
cai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻutum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷan muṟaimaiyiṟ
cūṭum kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velai
t tolperuṅ kāval pal paḻan=ti vum ceruviṟ cinavil Irupattorukā laraicuka
ḷaikaṭṭa paracurāman melvaruñ cān=ti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti Irutti(irutti)ya cempo
ṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta caya
ciṅkan Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiya liraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetik kulapperuma
laikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷa nā
maṇaiykkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācuṭaip paḻana mācuṇi(te)
tecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti(y) yātinakaravaiyil cantiran ṟolkulat tintirātanai vi
ḷai yamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palatanattoṭu niṟaikulatanakkuvaiyum
kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭaviṣai yamum pūcurarcer nalk kocalaināṭum tanmapālanai
vemmunai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūranai muraṇukat tākki
tikkaṇa kirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=ta ccan=ta n māviḻi n=to ṭa taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷa
tecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkavoṭṭal mahivāḷanai veñcamar vaḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟa
l yānaiyum peṇṭir peṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirtta
teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅka
panmanākiya kaṭārattaraiyanai vākayam porukaṭal kumpaṟkariyoṭu makappaṭut[tu-] rimaiyil piṟakkiya pe
ru netit tiṟakkamum Ārttavan nakar nakar perrttoḻil vācalil viccāratitoraṇamum moytto
ḷir punamaṇip putavamum kanamaṇik katavamum niṟai śrīvijayamum tuṟainiṟp pannaiyum vanmalaiyūrai
yiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭa lakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭi(li)ṅkamum kalaṅkā valvinai Ilaṅkācokamum (k)oppuṟu niṟaipu
nal māpappāḷamum kāvalan puricai mevilimpaṅkamum vaḷappantūṟuṭai vaḷappantūṟum kalai takkor pukaḻ ta
lait takkolamum titamāvalvinai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmukil kaṭuntiṟal lāmuritecamum tenakkalar poḻil mā
nakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṟmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī
rājentr(ā) coḷatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 9 Āvatu ḷ 2 100 3 10 8- ṉāl Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra coḻatevar nampirā
ṭṭiyār vāṉavaṉmāteviyār tirumaḻuvāṭi mātevaṟkku kuṭuttaruḷiṉa ponniṉ taḷikai Onṟiṉāl kuṭi(ñ)
ñaikkallāl Alakunilaippaṭi poṉ 100 9 10 8 kaḻañcu nūṟṟut toṇṇūṟ ṟeṇ kaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyār yā
ṇṭu 10 7 Āvatu Iṭṭa veḷḷittaḷikai Onṟiṉāl meṟpaṭikallāl Alakunilaipaṭiveḷḷi 2 100 9 10 4 va kaḻañ
cu Irunūṟṟu toṇṇūṟṟanāṟk kaḻañcey kāl .
Digital edition of SII 5.639 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
